PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.WhisperOver: Whisper you when you have spent more actions than available.
Whisper you (the GM) when any player or you has spent more actions than available.
Whisper you when you have spent more actions than available.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.WhisperReac: Whisper you when you have spent more reactions than available.
Whisper you (the GM) when any player or you has spent more reactions than available.
Whisper you when you have spent more reactions than available.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.WhisperUnde: Whisper you when you end your turn with actions remaining.
Whisper you (the GM) when any player or you ends their turn with actions remaining.
Whisper you when you end your turn with actions remaining.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.WhisperSust: Whisper you at the start of your turn if you have active effects that require a Sustain action.
Whisper you (the GM) when any player or you starts their turn with active effects that require a Sustain action.
Whisper you at the start of your turn if you have active effects that require a Sustain action.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.WhisperComp: Whisper you when you do an action that breaks a complex action sequence.
Whisper you (the GM) when any player or you does an action that breaks a complex action sequence.
Whisper you when you do an action that breaks your complex action sequence.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.ShowCoreTra: Display action tracking controls in the Foundry combat tracker.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.ShowPf2eHud: Display action tracking controls in the PF2e HUD tracker when it is present.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.UndoAlert.N: Alert on Move undo causes Action Undo
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.UndoAlert.H: Whisper player/GM when an undo (Ctrl + Z) forces undo of a non-movement action.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.UndoAlert.G: Whisper you (the GM) and the player when a Move Undo forces an Action Undo.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.UndoAlert.P: Whisper you when your Move Undo forces an Action Undo.
PF2E_ACTION_TRACKER.Settings.DebugMode.H: Turn on for extra debugging logs in console.
